mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_message WHERE deleted = 0 AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR message_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT id, receiver_id, title, content, message_type, read_status, read_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_message WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_message (receiver_id, title, content, message_type, read_status, read_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{receiverId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{readStatus}, #{readAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_message receiver_id = #{receiverId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, message_type = #{messageType}, read_status = #{readStatus}, read_at = #{readAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_message SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_message SET read_status = 1, read_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_message SET read_status = 1, read_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND receiver_id = #{receiverId}
